{{- /* Markdown image render hook — routes bundle-resource images through the opt-image optimizer; passes remote/absolute/non-bundle images through unchanged. Fires for every ![alt](src) in content. */ -}} {{- $r := "" -}} {{- with .Page.Resources.GetMatch .Destination -}}{{ $r = . }}{{- end -}} {{- if $r -}} {{- partial "opt-image.html" (dict "resource" $r "alt" .PlainText "loading" "lazy") -}} {{- else -}} {{- end -}}
